RichText.Text: 1. rapid economic and social growth 2. lead to a more open and fair society 3. fewer class barriers and differences 4. particularly/especialy/extremely influential 5. be made up of professionals like lawyers 6. take the place of traditional property owners 7. grow massively and become harder to define 8. lose control of family businesses 9. be based largely on specialized skills 10. decline substantially/dramatically 11. experience significant growth 12. lag far behind the United States (lagged-lagging) 13. make them more willing to take on debt 14. the rising standard of living 15. show his pride in the rise of car sales 16. state the economic and social changes 17. favourable/approving/supportive disapproving

1. 经济与社会快速的发展 2.导致一个更加开放公平的社会 3. 阶级壁垒/障碍与差异减少 4. 极具有影响力的 5. 由律师等专业人士组成 6. 取代传统产业所有者 7.大幅地扩张，界定更加困难 8. 失去对家族企业的掌控 9. 主要依靠专业的技能 10. 大幅/显著地下降 11. 实现显著增长 12. 远远落后 13. 让他们更愿意承担债务 14. 不断提高的生活水平 15. 为汽车销量上涨感到自豪 16. 阐述/表明经济与社会变革 17. 赞同的、支持的；反对的
